{ "activeState": null, "attributes": {}, "baseStyles": { "alignItems": "center", "display": "flex", "flexDirection": "column", "gap": "32px", "height": "650px", "justifyContent": "center", "paddingBottom": "60px", "paddingLeft": "180px", "paddingRight": "180px", "paddingTop": "60px", "position": "relative", "width": "100%" }, "blockClientScript": "", "blockDataScript": "bento_type = props.get(\"bento_type\", \"Category\")\nitems_list = []\nif bento_type == \"Category\":\n try:\n items_list = frappe.call(\"webshop.webshop.api.list_categories\", limit=4) or []\n except Exception:\n pass\nelse:\n try:\n items_list = frappe.call(\"webshop.webshop.api.list_collections\", limit=4) or []\n except Exception:\n pass\n\nnames = [props.get(\"first_item\"), props.get(\"second_item\"), props.get(\"third_item\"), props.get(\"fourth_item\")]\ndb_names = [item.get(\"name\") for item in items_list]\n\nfinal_names = []\nfor i in range(4):\n specified = names[i]\n exists = False\n if specified:\n if specified in db_names:\n exists = True\n else:\n try:\n doc_type = \"Website Category\" if bento_type == \"Category\" else \"Website Collection\"\n exists = bool(frappe.db.exists(doc_type, specified))\n except Exception:\n pass\n if exists:\n final_names.append(specified)\n else:\n if i < len(items_list):\n final_names.append(items_list[i].get(\"name\"))\n else:\n final_names.append(None)\n\nblock.first_item_name = final_names[0]\nblock.second_item_name = final_names[1]\nblock.third_item_name = final_names[2]\nblock.fourth_item_name = final_names[3]\nblock.bento_type = bento_type\nblock.visible = bool(final_names[0] or final_names[1] or final_names[2] or final_names[3])", "blockId":
